overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing two giant holographic koi fish swimming through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The camera follows the luminescent fish as they glide between skyscrapers adorned with bright advertisements and signage, creating a surreal cyberpunk atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: flying upward between buildings following a blue holographic fish

notable_agents.action: blue holographic koi fish swimming upward through the city canyon

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with red neon PETROCHEM signage at the top
bright cyan vertical neon light strip running up the building edge
skyscraper with illuminated grid pattern windows

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends through a narrow canyon of skyscrapers at night, following a glowing blue holographic fish. The PETROCHEM tower dominates the center view with its red neon signage, while vertical neon strips illuminate the building edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: large circular intersection with traffic patterns visible below

events.description: orange holographic fish enters from the left side of the frame
camera begins rotating around the two fish as they swim over the intersection

agents.ego_description: circling around both holographic fish as they swim in synchronized patterns over the city intersection

notable_agents.action: blue holographic fish swimming in circular pattern with the orange fish
orange holographic fish swimming from left to center, joining the blue fish

entered.detail: skyscraper with illuminated orange KANG TAO signage
large roundabout with traffic lights and illuminated road markings visible below

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide aerial view of a circular intersection as an orange holographic fish joins the blue one. The camera rotates around both fish as they swim over the roundabout, with the KANG TAO building visible on the right and sparse traffic moving on the streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city avenue with multi-lane traffic below

events.description: orange holographic fish swims away to the right and exits the frame

agents.ego_description: following the blue fish as it continues down the main avenue while the orange fish departs

notable_agents.action: blue holographic fish swimming forward down the avenue

entered.detail: distant skyscraper with FUYUTSUKI TOWER signage visible at the end of the avenue
tall building facade covered with multiple vertical neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The two fish separate as the orange one exits to the right, leaving the blue fish to continue down the main avenue. The camera follows the blue fish as the FUYUTSUKI TOWER becomes visible in the distant center, with vertical neon billboards lining the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit corporate avenue leading to FUYUTSUKI TOWER

agents.ego_description: steadily following the blue holographic fish toward the distant FUYUTSUKI TOWER

notable_agents.action: blue holographic fish swimming majestically toward the tower

entered.detail: multi-lane road with illuminated lane markings and street lights

segments.scene_description: The camera continues following the blue fish down the long avenue toward the FUYUTSUKI TOWER, which grows larger in the frame. The street is lined with bright neon advertisements and street lights, creating a classic cyberpunk cityscape atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a narrow urban canyon into a wide aerial vista before gliding down a sprawling neon avenue. It begins by climbing through a dense cluster of skyscrapers, trailing a glowing blue holographic fish past the red neon signage of the PETROCHEM tower. As the view opens into a wide circular intersection, an orange holographic fish joins the blue one, and the camera rotates around them both above a roundabout with the KANG TAO building to the right. The scene then shifts as the two fish separate, leaving the camera to follow the blue fish alone down a main avenue lined with vertical neon billboards. Finally, the perspective pushes forward through the bright advertisements and street lights of the cyberpunk cityscape, with the FUYUTSUKI TOWER growing larger in the frame.
